# Contributing

Thanks for your interest in this project.

## How to contribute

1. **Fork** the repo
2. **Clone** your fork locally
3. Make your changes (no build step needed — just edit HTML/CSS/JS)
4. **Test** by opening `index.html` in a browser or running `npx serve .`
5. Submit a **Pull Request** with a clear description of what you changed and why

## What contributions are welcome

- Bug fixes (layout issues, JS errors, broken links)
- Accessibility improvements
- Performance optimizations
- Responsive design fixes
- Documentation improvements

## What to avoid

- Adding framework dependencies (React, Vue, etc.)
- Changing personal content (name, experience, projects) — fork and customize instead
- Large new feature additions without discussion — open an issue first

## Code style

- CSS: Use existing custom properties (`var(--accent)`, etc.) — don't hardcode colors
- JS: Vanilla only, no jQuery or utility libraries
- Keep functions focused and commented if non-obvious

## Questions

Open a GitHub Issue and I'll respond when available.
